member.name: M:Jartisan.CLI.Commands.AddCommand.HandleAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a dependency to the project's pom.xml file.
member.param: The search query for finding the dependency.

member.name: M:Jartisan.CLI.Commands.InitCommand.Execute
member.summary: Initializes a new Maven project interactively or updates existing configurations.

member.name: M:Jartisan.CLI.Commands.InitCommand.GetUserConfig
member.summary: Asks the user for data via terminal. If empty, keeps the record's default.

member.name: M:Jartisan.CLI.Commands.ListCommand.Execute
member.summary: Lists all dependencies currently defined in the pom.xml file.

member.name: M:Jartisan.CLI.Commands.MakeCommand.Execute(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: [Make] Generates code scaffolding for a specific artifact type (e.g., controller, service).
member.param: The type of artifact to generate (e.g., controller, service, repository).
The name of the class or component to be created.
-c, --crud, Automatically generates full CRUD operations for the artifact.
-f, --force, Overwrites existing files if they already exist.

member.name: M:Jartisan.CLI.Commands.ScanCommand.Execute
member.summary: Scans the project directory structure and synchronizes it with the jartisan.json configuration.

member.name: T:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext
member.summary: Represents the execution context for a console application command, containing command metadata and parsed arguments.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.CommandName
member.summary: Gets the name of the command being executed.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.Arguments
member.summary: Gets the raw arguments passed to the application, including the command name itself.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.State
member.summary: Gets the custom state object that can be used to share data across commands.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.GlobalOptions
member.summary: Gets the parsed global options that apply across all commands.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.CommandDepth
member.summary: Gets the depth of the command in a nested command hierarchy. Used internally by the framework.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.EscapeIndex
member.summary: Gets the index of the escape separator ('--') in the arguments, or -1 if not present. Used internally by the framework.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.InternalCommandArgs
member.summary: Gets the internal command arguments with global options removed. Used internally by the framework.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.CommandArguments
member.summary: Gets the arguments intended for the current command, excluding the command name and any escaped arguments after '--'.

member.name: P:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.EscapedArguments
member.summary: Gets the arguments that appear after the escape separator ('--'), which are not parsed by the command. Returns an empty span if no escape separator is present.

member.name: M:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleAppContext.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of all arguments joined by spaces.
member.returns: A space-separated string of all arguments.

member.name: M:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleApp.Run(System.String[],System.Delegate)
M:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleApp.RunAsync(System.String[],System.Delegate)
M:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleApp.ConsoleAppBuilder.ConfigureDefaultConfiguration
member.summary: Create configuration with SetBasePath(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory()) and AddJsonFile(appsettings.json).

member.name: M:ConsoleAppFramework.ConsoleApp.ConsoleAppBuilder.ConfigureDefaultConfiguration(System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder})
member.summary: Create configuration with SetBasePath(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory()) and AddJsonFile(appsettings.json).
